title: Marketing Copilot — placeholders registry
description: Schema for docs/placeholders.json: the canonical list of Mustache-style placeholders used in templates, grouped by domain. The wizard replaces wizard-owned placeholders; entries with "marker": true are per-deliverable runtime slots that survive the wizard.

name.description: Placeholder name as it appears between {{ }} in template files.

required.description: True when the wizard must fill this placeholder before /validate-setup can pass.

marker.description: True for runtime slots resolved per deliverable at production time — never substituted by the wizard.

used_in.description: File(s), folder(s) or skill(s) where this placeholder appears.
